rulings.Case Title: ANDRE WRIGHT VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 8, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Todd Shipyards Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are continued on the court¿s own motion to March 5, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. For over three years it has been the policy and practice of this Department to not allow motions to be calendared or heard on Fridays. However, the court will entertain this motion due to the court¿s inadvertent acceptance of this filing. Defendant has not yet submitted a courtesy copy of its moving papers to the court and must do so by February 11, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
